General.Name: Kyivstar Group Ltd. Common Shares
General.Description: Kyivstar Group Ltd. provides a range of mobile communication and broadband services for individual and corporate customers in Ukraine. It offers a range of connectivity and digital services, including mobile and fixed-line voice and data, ride-hailing, e-health, digital TV, and enterprise solutions, such as Big Data, cloud, and cybersecurity. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Dubai, the United Arab Emirates. Kyivstar Group Ltd. is a subsidiary of Vimpelcom Amsterdam B.V.
General.Address: Index Tower,, Dubai, United Arab Emirates, 1082 MD
